```{r bodyclocks_setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
source(file.path("..", "R", "io_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "annotation_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "biomart_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "string_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "validation_utils.R"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "tables"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "reports"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "mouse"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "baboon"))
```



```{r libraries}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(rain)
library(biomaRt)
library(STRINGdb)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
```

```{r load_data_deseq2_normalization}
# Prepare count matrix and sample table for DESEq2
sampletable <- read.csv("data/meta/osmo_meta.csv", header=T, sep=",")
rownames(sampletable) <- sampletable$sample
count_matrix <- read.delim("data/raw/osmo_raw.csv", header=T, sep=",", row.names=1)
count_matrix <- count_matrix[rowMeans(count_matrix) >= 50,] # mean 50 reads gene expression cutoff

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = count_matrix,
                              colData = sampletable,
                              design = ~ timepoint)

dds$timepoint <- factor(dds$timepoint, levels = c("0h",
                                                    "4h",
                                                    "8h",
                                                    "12h",
                                                    "16h",
                                                    "20h",
                                                    "24h",
                                                    "28h",
                                                    "32h",
                                                    "36h",
                                                    "40h",
                                                    "44h",
                                                    "48h"
                                                    ))
# Run DESeq2
dds1 <- DESeq(dds)
res <- results(dds1, contrast = c("timepoint", "4h", "0h"))
res_table <- as.data.frame(res)
norm_counts <- as.data.frame(counts(dds1, normalized = TRUE))
```


```{r run_rain}
# RAIN circadian analaysis
rain_data <- as.matrix(norm_counts)

rain_data <- subset(rain_data, select = c(X4h_A2, X28h_A8, X4h_B2, X28h_B8, X4h_C2, X28h_C8,
X8h_A3, X32h_A9, X8h_B3, X32h_B9, X8h_C3, X32h_C9,
X12h_A4, X36h_A10, X12h_B4, X36h_B10, X12h_C4, X36h_C10,
X16h_A5, X40h_A11, X16h_B5, X40h_B11, X16h_C5, X40h_C11,
X20h_A6, X44h_A12, X20h_B6, X44h_B12, X20h_C6, X44h_C12,
X24h_A7, X48h_A13, X24h_B7, X48h_B13, X24h_C14, X48h_C13))

results <- rain(t(rain_data), deltat=4, period=24, nr.series=6,
                peak.border=c(0.3, 0.7), method = "longitudinal", adjp.method='ABH', verbose=TRUE)
```

```{r adjust_pvalues_annotate}
p_values <- results$pVal

results$BH.Q <- p.adjust(p_values, method = "BH")
norm_counts <- subset(norm_counts, select = -c(X0h_A1, X0h_B1, X0h_C1))
osm_circ <- merge(norm_counts, results, by = 0, all.x = TRUE)

# Remove .xx from the Row.names column
osm_circ$Row.names <- gsub("\\..*", "", osm_circ$Row.names)

# Set up the Ensembl BioMart connection
ensembl <- connect_biomart("mmusculus_gene_ensembl")

# Query Ensembl BioMart to get gene descriptions
gene_info <- get_biomart_annotation(
  ids = osm_circ$Row.names,
  mart = ensembl,
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol", "external_gene_name", "description"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  cache_key = "osmotic_stress_gene_info"
)

# Prioritize MGI symbols, fall back to external_gene_name only if needed
gene_info <- gene_info %>%
  mutate(preferred_symbol = ifelse(!is.na(mgi_symbol) & mgi_symbol != "", 
                                  mgi_symbol, 
                                  external_gene_name))

# Ensure unique entries in gene_info
gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$external_gene_name), ]

# Remove text within square brackets, including the brackets themselves
gene_info$description <- gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", gene_info$description)

# Trim any trailing whitespace that might be left
gene_info$description <- trimws(gene_info$description)

merged <- merge(osm_circ, gene_info, by.x = "Row.names", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)
write.csv(merged, file = "results/tables/osmo_circ.csv")
```

```{r prepare_heatmap}
# Prepare data frame for heatmap
metadata <- read.csv("data/meta/osmo_meta.csv")
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$sample

osmo_05 <- subset(merged, BH.Q <= 0.05)
osmo_05 <- osmo_05[order(osmo_05$phase),]
rownames(osmo_05) <- osmo_05[,1]
osmo_05 <- subset(osmo_05, select = -c(Row.names, external_gene_name, description, pVal, phase, peak.shape, period, BH.Q, mgi_symbol, preferred_symbol))
col_names3 <- c("04h_A2", "08h_A3", "12h_A4", "16h_A5", "20h_A6", "24h_A7", "28h_A8", "32h_A9", "36h_A10", "40h_A11", "44h_A12", "48h_A13", "04h_B2", "08h_B3", "12h_B4", "16h_B5", "20h_B6", "24h_B7", "28h_B8", "32h_B9", "36h_B10","40h_B11", "44h_B12","48h_B13", "04h_C2", "08h_C3", "12h_C4", "16h_C5", "20h_C6", "24h_C14", "28h_C8", "32h_C9", "36h_C10", "40h_C11", "44h_C12", "48h_C13")
colnames(osmo_05) <- col_names3
osmo_05 <- osmo_05[, order(names(osmo_05))]
df1 <- as.matrix(osmo_05)
scaled_df1 <- t(scale(t(df1)))

chm1 <- Heatmap(scaled_df1, name = "Osmo bhq 0.05", cluster_columns = FALSE, cluster_rows = FALSE, show_row_names = FALSE)

ensure_dir("results/osmo/plots")
pdf(file = "results/osmo/plots/heatmap_osmo.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
draw(chm1)
dev.off()

ensure_dir("results/publication_figures")
pdf(file = "results/publication_figures/Fig1B_heatmap_osmo.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
draw(chm1)
dev.off()
png(file = "results/publication_figures/Fig1B_heatmap_osmo.png", width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", res = 600)
draw(chm1)
dev.off()

```

```{r prepare_string_nodes}
# Get STRING DB interaction data and functional enrichment

nodes_data <- merged %>%
    filter(BH.Q <= 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol)


# Get list of gene symbols for STRING API
#gene_list <- nodes_data$symbol

# ENSEMBL gene IDs return more results than MGI symbols
gene_list <- nodes_data$Row.names

```


```{r prepare_gene_mapping}
# Create comprehensive gene mapping dictionary

gene_mapping <- create_gene_mapping(
  gene_ids = merged$Row.names,
  symbols = nodes_data$symbol
)

cat("Created mapping for", length(gene_mapping), "genes\n")
```



```{r build_string_network}
# Get protein-protein interactions and functional enrichment.
network_bundle <- get_string_network_bundle(
  gene_list = gene_list,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  species_id = species_id,
  nodes_data = nodes_data
)
edges <- network_bundle$edges_by_threshold
cluster_data <- network_bundle$cluster_data

phase_colors <- c("4" = "orange", "8" = "yellow", "12" = "red", "16" = "purple", "20" = "navy", "24" = "lightblue")

network_outputs <- build_string_network_outputs(
  cluster_data = cluster_data,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  gene_info = gene_info,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  phase_colors = phase_colors)

cluster_data <- network_outputs$cluster_data
cluster_data_export <- cluster_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(preferredNames = vapply(preferredNames, paste, character(1), collapse = ","))
write.csv(cluster_data_export, file = "results/tables/osmo_enrichment.csv", row.names = FALSE)
nodes <- network_outputs$nodes
nodes_with_tooltips <- network_outputs$nodes_with_tooltips
cluster_for_plot <- network_outputs$cluster_for_plot
cluster_descriptions <- network_outputs$cluster_descriptions

save_string_network_outputs(
  outputs = network_outputs,
  edges = edges,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/osmo",
  prefix = "osmo"
)
```

```{r prepare_timeseries_data}
# Prepare data frame for plotting

df <- subset(merged, select = -c(Row.names, pVal, phase, peak.shape, period, BH.Q, external_gene_name, description, preferred_symbol))
col_names2 <- c("01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12", "01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12", "01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12","Gene")
colnames(df) <- col_names2
data <- pivot_longer(df, cols = !Gene, names_to = "time_point", values_to = "reads")

qval_df <- merged[c("mgi_symbol", "BH.Q")]
new_pval_names <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")
colnames(qval_df) <- new_pval_names

data <- data[order(data$time_point),]

mean_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, mean)
sd_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, sd)
mean_sd <- merge(mean_data, sd_data, by = c("Gene", "time_point"))
names <- c("Gene", "time_point", "mean", "sd")
colnames(mean_sd) <- names
mean_sd <- inner_join(mean_sd, qval_df, by = "Gene")
save_rds_checked(mean_sd, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/osmo/osmo_data.rds")

```

```{r compute_amplitude_display_table}
# Prepare data frame for display

dt <- merged %>%
  mutate(ZT4 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("X4h_A2", "X28h_A8", "X4h_B2", "X28h_B8", "X4h_C2", "X28h_C8"))),
         ZT8 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("X8h_A3", "X32h_A9", "X8h_B3", "X32h_B9", "X8h_C3", "X32h_C9"))),
         ZT12 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("X12h_A4", "X36h_A10", "X12h_B4", "X36h_B10", "X12h_C4", "X36h_C10"))),
         ZT16 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("X16h_A5", "X40h_A11", "X16h_B5", "X40h_B11", "X16h_C5", "X40h_C11"))),
         ZT20 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("X20h_A6", "X44h_A12", "X20h_B6", "X44h_B12", "X20h_C6", "X44h_C12"))),
         ZT24 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("X24h_A7", "X48h_A13", "X24h_B7", "X48h_B13", "X24h_C14", "X48h_C13")))
  )

means <- dt[c("ZT4", "ZT8", "ZT12", "ZT16", "ZT20", "ZT24")]

min_val <- apply(means, 1, min)
max_val <- apply(means, 1, max)

Amp_fc_log2 <- log2(max_val / min_val)
Amp_fc <- max_val / min_val

dt <- cbind(dt, Amp_fc_log2, Amp_fc)


display_dt <- dt %>%
  dplyr::select(mgi_symbol, description, pVal, BH.Q, Amp_fc_log2, phase) %>%
  dplyr::rename(symbol = mgi_symbol) %>%
  arrange(BH.Q)

save_rds_checked(display_dt, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/osmo/osmo_display_dt.rds")
```
